conflict_minerals_notes: NVIDIA publishes a Conflict Minerals Policy (Section 1502 compliant) but does not disclose per-SKU smelter lists. EVGA sourced primary metals through RMI-registered smelters as of 2022 filing. Cooperative has not independently verified. See: nvidia.com/content/dam/en-zz/Solutions/about-nvidia/conflict-minerals-policy.pdf
planned_eol_disposition: Resell or GPU-focused e-waste recycler (e.g. OceanTech)
notes: Tested with gpu-burn 10min. No VRAM errors. VBIOS version 94.04.71.00.CA. Fan bearing sounds clean.

conflict_minerals_notes: No conflict minerals report obtained. Corsair does not publish a public CMRT for PSU products. Flag for follow-up at next procurement cycle.
planned_eol_disposition: Return to Corsair takeback programme if available at EOL
notes: 80 PLUS Gold certified. Fully modular. New in box from authorised reseller.

conflict_minerals_notes: AMD publishes an annual Responsible Sourcing Report covering 3TG minerals across all product lines. Smelter list available via AMD website. Per-unit CMRT not available for consumer CPUs. AMD is an RMAP active member.
planned_eol_disposition: Resell to secondary market or CPU recycler
notes: Grade B cosmetic only (scratched IHS). Passes all cinebench benchmarks. No signs of overclocking damage (stock VID in Ryzen Master).
